complexity_reasoning: Scope: 4 (single file, ~25 lines change). Risk: 3 (stated low in issue). Novelty: 4 (follows existing approval pattern). Cross-Domain: 2 (pipeline only). Ambiguity: 2 (exact file, lines, and fix approach provided). Dependencies: 2 (self-contained). Total: 17-18
